task_completion.description: Create a FreeCAD Spreadsheet with the required named parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A FreeCAD Spreadsheet view is visible containing cells with named parameters specifically requested in the task: motor hole pattern (e.g., 31mm), bore diameter (22mm), base thickness, and frame hole spacing.

task_completion.description: Model the NEMA 17 motor-side attachment geometry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D model in the FreeCAD viewport displays a central large circular cutout (collar bore) surrounded by exactly 4 smaller circular cutouts arranged in a square pattern.

task_completion.description: Model the robot-frame-side attachment holes for V-slot 2020 extrusion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D model includes an extended base, flange, or bracket section with at least 2 additional holes or slots (distinct from the 4 motor holes) designed to mount to the aluminum extrusion.

task_completion.description: Save the FreeCAD model to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar shows 'motor_mount.FCStd', or a file explorer/terminal shows the file 'motor_mount.FCStd' successfully saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the solid body as an STL file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer, terminal window, or FreeCAD export dialog confirms the existence or creation of 'motor_mount.stl' in the '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the FreeCAD GUI to build the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the FreeCAD application open with its standard interface (toolbars, 3D viewport, Combo View) rather than the agent just writing a Python script in a text editor to generate the files.

integrity.description: Verify the model was constructed using native FreeCAD features and a Spreadsheet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD Combo View (Model tree on the left) shows a history of parametric operations (e.g., Sketches, Pads, Pockets) and a Spreadsheet object, proving it is not just an imported static mesh.

integrity.description: Verify the dimensions are actually driven by the spreadsheet.
integrity.visual_evidence: When a sketch dimension or feature property is visible in the screenshots, it shows an 'f(x)' icon or a formula referencing the Spreadsheet (e.g., 'Spreadsheet.bore_diameter'), confirming the model is parametric and not hardcoded.

privileged_info_for_vlm: NEMA 17 standard specifications: Motor body is 42.3mm x 42.3mm. Mounting hole pattern is exactly 4 holes in a 31mm x 31mm square. Centering collar (bore) diameter is 22mm. The frame attachment requires a minimum of 2 mounting holes spaced for V-slot 2020 extrusion (20mm slot pitch).
